common.siteDescription: Net vremeni? My zdes. Kratkie novosti i besplatnye AI onlayn instrumenty.

home.heroDescription: Net vremeni? My zdes. Kratkie novosti i besplatnye onlayn instrumenty.
home.newsDescription: Ezhednevnye kratkie obzory vazhnykh novostey. Ekonomika, tekhnologii, obrazovanie, sport - vsyo v odnom meste.
home.toolsDescription: Besplatnye AI onlayn instrumenty. Perepisyvanie teksta, proverka grammatiki, obyedinenie PDF, szhatie izobrazheniy i mnogoe drugoe.

tools.pageDescription: Obyedinenie PDF, instrumenty dlya izobrazheniy, perepisyvanie teksta, JSON formatirovanie i mnogoe drugoe. Registraciya ne nuzhna. Bystro, besplatno i bezopasno.

categories.aiDesc: Instrumenty obrabotki teksta na baze iskusstvennogo intellekta
categories.imageDesc: Szhatie, izmenenie razmera, obrezka i konvertaciya izobrazheniy
categories.devDesc: JSON, Base64, Regex, SQL, HTML, JS, CSV i mnogoe drugoe dlya razrabotchikov
categories.generatorsDesc: Generaciya paroley, UUID, QR-kodov, gradientov, emodzi i cvetov
categories.textDesc: Konverter registra, binarnyy, ROT13, proverka raznic, taymer, schyotchik slov

ai-text-rewriter.name: AI Perepisyvatel teksta
ai-text-rewriter.description: Perepishite i perefraziruyte tekst s pomoshchyu AI. Izmenite ton, uprostite yazyk ili sdelayte tekst bolee professionalnym.

ai-text-summarizer.name: AI Summarizator teksta
ai-text-summarizer.description: Rezumirujte dlinnye teksty, stati i dokumenty s pomoshchyu AI. Poluchite kratkie rezyume s klyuchevymi momentami.

ai-grammar-checker.name: AI Proverka grammatiki
ai-grammar-checker.description: Proverte i ispravte grammaticheskie, orfograficheskie i punktuacionnye oshibki s pomoshchyu AI. Poluchite mgnovennye ispravleniya.

pdf-merge.name: Obyedinenie PDF
pdf-merge.description: Obyedinte neskolko PDF-faylov v odin dokument onlayn. Pereraspredelite stranicy i obyedinyayte v lyubom poryadke.

pdf-split.name: Razdelitel stranic PDF
pdf-split.description: Izvlekite opredelyonnye stranicy iz PDF-fayla onlayn. Vyberite diapazon stranic, razdelite i skahayte.

pdf-compress.name: Szhatie PDF
pdf-compress.description: Umenshite razmer PDF-fayla onlayn. Udalite metadannye i optimiziruyte strukturu dlya szhatiya.

image-compress.name: Szhatie izobrazheniy
image-compress.description: Szhimayte i izmenyayte razmer izobrazheniy onlayn. Umenshite razmer fayla sokhranaya kachestvo. Podderzhka JPEG, PNG i WebP.

image-convert.name: Konverter izobrazheniy
image-convert.description: Konvertiruyte izobrazheniya mezhdu formatami JPEG, PNG i WebP onlayn. Fayly ostayutsya v vashem brauzere.

image-resize.name: Izmenenie razmera izobrazheniy
image-resize.description: Izmenite razmer izobrazheniy do tochnykh razmerov ili v procentakh onlayn. Sokhranenie proportsiy. Podderzhka JPEG, PNG i WebP.

image-crop.name: Obrezka izobrazheniy
image-crop.description: Obrezayte izobrazheniya s pomoshchyu vydeleniya oblasti onlayn. Vyberite lyubuyu oblast i skahayte obrezannyy rezultat.

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatirovaniye i Validaciya
json-formatter.description: Formatirujte, validirujte i ukraste vashi JSON dannye onlayn. Minifikaciya ili formatirovaniye s podsvetkoy sintaksisa.

base64-encode-decode.name: Base64 Kodirovanie/Dekodirovanie
base64-encode-decode.description: Kodirujte tekst v Base64 ili dekodirujte stroki Base64 onlayn. Podderzhka UTF-8 teksta i faylov.

regex-tester.name: Tester regulyarnykh vyrazheniy
regex-tester.description: Testirujte i otslezhivayte regulyarnye vyrazheniya onlayn v realnom vremeni. Podsvechivajte sovpadeniya i prosmatrivayte gruppy.

hash-generator.name: Generator kheshey
hash-generator.description: Generirujte kheshi SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 iz teksta onlayn. Besplatnyy kriptograficheskiy khesh-instrument.

qr-code-generator.name: Generator QR-kodov
qr-code-generator.description: Generirujte QR-kody dlya URL, teksta, email, nomerov telefonov i prochego. Skahayte v formate PNG ili SVG.

color-picker.name: Vybor cveta i Generator palitry
color-picker.description: Vybirayte cveta, konvertiruyte mezhdu formatami HEX, RGB, HSL i sozdavayte krasivye cvetnye palitry.

lorem-ipsum-generator.name: Generator Lorem Ipsum
lorem-ipsum-generator.description: Generirujte tekst-zapolnitel lorem ipsum dlya dizayna i maketov. Vybirayte abzacy, predlozheniya ili slova.

word-counter.name: Schyotchik slov
word-counter.description: Podschayte slova, simvoly, predlozheniya i abzacy v vashem tekste. Ocenka vremeni chteniya.

case-converter.name: Konverter registra
case-converter.description: Konvertiruyte tekst mezhdu VERKHNIM, nizhnim, Nachalnye Bukvy, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case i drugimi registrami.

slug-generator.name: Generator slug-ov
slug-generator.description: Generirujte chistye URL slug-i iz lyubogo teksta. Udalyayte spetsialnye simvoly i sozdavayte SEO-druzhestvennyye URL.

text-diff.name: Proverka raznic teksta
text-diff.description: Sravnite dva teksta i naydite otlichiya. Podsvechivajte dobavleniya, udaleniya i izmeneniya postrochno.

html-entity-codec.name: HTML Entity Kodirovshchik/Dekoder
html-entity-codec.description: Kodirujte spetsialnye simvoly v HTML entity ili dekodirujte HTML entity obratno v tekst.

url-encode-decode.name: URL Kodirovanie/Dekodirovanie
url-encode-decode.description: Kodirujte ili dekodirujte URL stroki onlayn. Konvertiruyte spetsialnye simvoly v procentnoe kodirovanie ili obratno.

jwt-decoder.name: JWT Dekoder
jwt-decoder.description: Dekodirujte i issleduyte JSON Web Token (JWT) onlayn. Prosmatrivayte zagolovok, poleznuyu nagruzku i status isteicheniya sroka.

markdown-preview.name: Predprosmotr Markdown
markdown-preview.description: Pishite i prosmatrivayte Markdown v realnom vremeni. Podderzhka zagolovkov, spiskov, blokov koda i prochego.

timestamp-converter.name: Konverter vremennych metok
timestamp-converter.description: Konvertiruyte vremennyye metki Unix v chitaemye daty i naoborot. Podderzhka sekund i millisekund.

css-minifier.name: CSS Minifikator i Formatirovalshchik
css-minifier.description: Minifitsiruyte CSS dlya umenesheniya razmera fayla ili otformatirujte minificirovannyy CSS dlya chitaemosti. Prosmatrivayte ekonomiyu razmera.

number-base-converter.name: Konverter sistem schisleniya
number-base-converter.description: Konvertiruyte chisla mezhdu Dvoichnoy, Vosmerichhnoy, Desyatichnoy i Shestnadcaterichhnoy sistemami. Konvertaciya v realnom vremeni s validaciey.

csv-to-json.name: Konverter CSV v JSON
csv-to-json.description: Konvertiruyte dannye CSV v format JSON onlayn. Podderzhka polzovatelskikh razdeliteley, strok zagolovkov i poley v kavychkakh.

cron-parser.name: Analizator Cron vyrazheniy
cron-parser.description: Analizirujte i ponimayte cron vyrazheniya. Prosmatrivayte chitaemoye opisaniye i vremya sleduyushchego zapuska.

html-minifier.name: HTML Minifikator i Formatirovalshchik
html-minifier.description: Minifitsiruyte HTML dlya umenesheniya razmera fayla ili otformatirujte minificirovannyy HTML dlya chitaemosti. Udalite kommentarii i probely.

js-minifier.name: JavaScript Minifikator i Formatirovalshchik
js-minifier.description: Minifitsiruyte JavaScript dlya umenesheniya razmera fayla ili otformatirujte minificirovannyy JS dlya chitaemosti. Udalite kommentarii i probely.

sql-formatter.name: SQL Formatirovshchik
sql-formatter.description: Formatirujte i ukraste SQL zaprosy onlayn. Vyravnivayte klyuchevye slova i strukturirujte vyrazheniya.

json-to-csv.name: Konverter JSON v CSV
json-to-csv.description: Konvertiruyte massivy JSON v format CSV onlayn. Podderzhka polzovatelskikh razdeliteley i skachivaniya.

ip-address-info.name: Informaciya ob IP adrese
ip-address-info.description: Prosmotrite vash publichnyy IP adres, user agent, razreshenie ekrana i informaciyu o brauzere.

password-generator.name: Generator paroley
password-generator.description: Generirujte nadyozhnye sluchajnye paroli s nastroivaemoy dlinoy i tipami simvolov. Indikator nadezhnosti parolya vklyuchyon.

uuid-generator.name: Generator UUID
uuid-generator.description: Generirujte identifikatory UUID v4 onlayn. Massovaya generaciya, vybor registra, s defisom ili bez.

meta-tag-generator.name: Generator meta-tegov
meta-tag-generator.description: Generirujte HTML meta-tegi dlya SEO. Sozdavayte Open Graph, Twitter Card i standrartnye meta-tegi s predprosmatrom Google.

aspect-ratio-calculator.name: Kalkulyator sootnosheniya storon
aspect-ratio-calculator.description: Vychislyayte i konvertiruyte sootnosheniya storon. Ispolzuyte populyarnye presety 16:9, 4:3 i nahodite sootvetstvuyushchie razresheniya.

emoji-picker.name: Vybor emodzi i Poisk
emoji-picker.description: Prosmatrivayte, ishchite i kopiruyte emodzi po kategoriyam. Odnim klikom kopiruyte v bufer obmena.

gradient-generator.name: Generator CSS gradientov
gradient-generator.description: Sozdavayte krasivye lineynye i radialnye CSS gradienty s neskolkimi cvetovymi ostanovkami. Predprosmotr v realnom vremeni i kopirovanie CSS koda.

placeholder-image.name: Generator izobrazheniy-zapolniteley
placeholder-image.description: Generirujte izobrazheniya-zapolniteli s polzovatelskimi razmerami, cvetami i tekstom. Skahayte v formate PNG ili JPEG.

text-to-binary.name: Konverter teksta v dvoichniy kod
text-to-binary.description: Konvertiruyte tekst v dvoichniy, shestnadcaterichnyy ili vosmerichnyy format i obratno. Podderzhka neskolkikh formatov kodirovaniya.

rot13-encoder.name: ROT13 Kodirovshchik/Dekoder
rot13-encoder.description: Kodirujte i dekodirujte tekst s pomoshchyu shifra Cezarya ROT13. Podderzhka polzovatelskikh znacheniy sdviga ot 1 do 25.

pomodoro-timer.name: Taymer Pomodoro
pomodoro-timer.description: Taymer fokusirovki po tekhnike Pomodoro. 25-minutnye rabochiye sessii s 5-minutnymi pererivami. Zvukovye uvedomleniya i otslezhivanie sessiy.

json-to-yaml.name: Konverter JSON v YAML
json-to-yaml.description: Konvertiruyte JSON v YAML i YAML v JSON onlayn. Dvunapravlennaya konvertaciya s pravilnym formatirovaniem.

xml-formatter.name: XML Formatirovshchik i Validator
xml-formatter.description: Formatirujte, minifitsiruyte i validirujte XML onlayn. Formatiruyte s polzovatelskim otstupom i proveryayte sootvetstvie tegov.

markdown-to-html.name: Konverter Markdown v HTML
markdown-to-html.description: Konvertiruyte Markdown v HTML s predprosmatrom v realnom vremeni. Podderzhka zagolovkov, zhirnogo, kursiva, ssylok i blokov koda.

favicon-generator.name: Generator favicon
favicon-generator.description: Zagruzite izobrazhenie i sgenerirujte favicon v raznykh razmerakh (ot 16x16 do 512x512). Skahayte po otdelnosti ili kak ZIP.

svg-to-png.name: Konverter SVG v PNG
svg-to-png.description: Konvertiruyte SVG v PNG s polzovatelskimi razmerami onlayn. Vstavte SVG kod ili zagruzite fayl, zadayte shirinu i vysotu.

text-to-speech.name: Tekst v rech
text-to-speech.description: Konvertiruyte tekst v rech cherez Web Speech API. Vybirayte iz dostupnykh golosov, nastraivayte skorost, ton i gromkost.

character-counter.name: Schyotchik simvolov
character-counter.description: Podschayte simvoly, slova, predlozheniya, abzacy i stroki. Prosmatrivayte vremya chteniya, govoreniya i chastotu simvolov.

find-and-replace.name: Nayti i Zamenit
find-and-replace.description: Nahodite i zamenyayte tekst s podderzhkoy regex, uchyotom registra i poiska chlykh slov. Podsvechivanie vsekh sovpadeniy v realnom vremeni.

yaml-to-json.name: Konverter YAML v JSON
yaml-to-json.description: Konvertiruyte YAML v JSON onlayn s validaciey i podsvechivaniem oshibok. Podderzhka vlozhennykh obyektov, massivov i kommentariev.

http-status-codes.name: Spravochnik HTTP kodov sostoyaniya
http-status-codes.description: Poiskovyy spravochnik vsekh HTTP kodov sostoyaniya s opisaniyami i kategoriyami (1xx-5xx). Filtraciya po kategorii ili poisk po kodu.

unit-converter.name: Konverter edinits
unit-converter.description: Konvertiruyte edinitsy dliny, vesa, temperatury, skorosti, tsiforvogo khraneniya, vremeni i ploshchadi. Podderzhka metricheskoy i imperskoy sistem.

invoice-generator.name: Generator schetov
invoice-generator.description: Sozdavayte professionalnye scheta s rekvizitami kompanii, pozitsiyami, raschetom naloga i itogovymi summami. Skahayte kak PDF.

morse-code.name: Perevodchik koda Morze
morse-code.description: Konvertiruyte tekst v kod Morze i kod Morze v tekst. Audio vosproizvedenie, spravochnaya tablitsa i dvunapravlennyy perevod.

random-text-generator.name: Generator sluchaynogo teksta
random-text-generator.description: Generirujte sluchajnye slova, predlozheniya, abzacy, imena, email adresa i telefony dlya testirovaniya i maketov.

text-repeater.name: Povtoritel teksta
text-repeater.description: Povtoryajte tekst N raz s polzovatelskim razdelitelem, prefiksom, suffiksom i optsiyami numeratsii.

video-to-gif.name: Video v GIF
video-to-gif.description: Izvlekayte animirovannye klipy iz video faylov. Nastrayvajte vremya nachala, dlitelnost, FPS i razreshenie.

color-palette-generator.name: Generator tsvetovoy palitry
color-palette-generator.description: Sozdavayte garmonichnye tsvetovye palitry iz bazovogo tsveta. Dopolnitelnye, analogovye, triadnye i tetradnye garmonii.

backlink-generator.name: Generator obratnyh ssylok
backlink-generator.description: Sozdavayte kod ssylok v formatah HTML, Markdown, BBCode, Textile, Wiki i reStructuredText.

json-path-finder.name: Poiskovik JSON putey
json-path-finder.description: Naviragjte po strukture JSON s interaktivnym drevom. Nazhimayte na uzly, nahodite puti.

chmod-calculator.name: Chmod Kalkulyator
chmod-calculator.description: Interaktivnyy kalkulyator prav dostupa Unix. Konvertatsiya mezhdu vosmerichnymi (755) i simvolnymi (rwxr-xr-x) oboznacheniyami.

markdown-table-generator.name: Generator Markdown tablits
markdown-table-generator.description: Sozdavayte Markdown tablitsy s vizualnym redaktorom. Dobavlyayte stroki, stolbtsy, nastraivayte vyravnivanie.

regex-library.name: Biblioteka shablonov Regex
regex-library.description: Kuratorskaya biblioteka regex shablonov dlya email, URL, dat, chisel i drugogo. Testiruyte shablony.

image-to-base64.name: Izobrazhenie v Base64
image-to-base64.description: Konvertiruyte izobrazheniya v stroki Base64. Vyvod v vide Data URI, CSS fona ili HTML img tega.

base64-to-image.name: Base64 v Izobrazhenie
base64-to-image.description: Dekodiruyte stroki Base64 obratno v izobrazheniya. Avtoopredelenie JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG.

text-truncator.name: Usekatel teksta
text-truncator.description: Usekayte tekst po simvolam, slovam ili predlozheniyam. Vyberite pozitsiyu mnogotochiya i sohranenie tselyh slov.

market-tracker.name: Otslezhivanie rynochnykh tsen
market-tracker.description: Otslezhivayte tseny Bitcoin, Ethereum, Zolota i Nefti v realnom vremeni. Smotrite 24-chasovye izmeneniya, konvertiruyte mezhdu valyutami (USD, AZN, EUR).

about.title: O nas
about.metaDescription: O platforme Vaxtim Yoxdu - Besplatnye AI onlayn instrumenty.
about.motto: Net vremeni? My zdes dlya vas
about.description: Vaxtim Yoxdu - eto platforma, predlagayushchaya kratkie obzory novostey na azerbaydzhanskom yazyke i besplatnye onlayn instrumenty. Nasha cel - ekonomit vashe vremya: dostavlyat vazhnye novosti v kratkom i ponyatnom vide, a takzhe predlagat besplatnye instrumenty dlya uprosheniya vashikh povsednevnykh zadach.
about.missionDescription: My verim, chto kachestvennaya informaciya i poleznye instrumenty dolzhny byt besplatnymi i legkodostupnymi dlya vsekh. Registraciya ne trebuetsya, skrytykh platezhey net. Tolko moshchnye instrumenty, kotorye rabotayut, i obzory novostey, kotorye ekonomyat vashe vremya.
about.privacyDescription: Bolshinstvo nashikh instrumentov rabotaet neposredstvenno v vashem brauzere - vashi dannye ne pokidayut vashe ustroystvo. Dlya instrumentov na baze AI vashi dannye obrabatyvayutsya bezopasno i nikogda ne khranyatsya.
about.contactDescription: Est idei ili predlozheniya? Ne stesnyaytes pisat nam:

privacy.title: Politika konfidencialnosti
privacy.metaDescription: Politika konfidencialnosti platformy onlayn instrumentov Vaxtim Yoxdu.
privacy.collectDescription: My sobirayem minimum informacii dlya predostavleniya nashikh uslug. Klientskie instrumenty obrabatyvayut dannye polnostyu v vashem brauzere - nichego ne otpravlyaetsya na nashi servery.
privacy.aiDescription: Dlya instrumentov na baze AI vash vkhodnyy tekst otpravlyaetsya na nashi zashchishchyonnye servery dlya obrabotki. My ne khranim, ne registriruem i ne ispolzuem vashi vkhodnye dannye dlya obucheniya. Dannye udalyayutsya srazu posle obrabotki.
privacy.analyticsDescription: My ispolzuem Google Analytics dlya ponimaniya togo, kak posetiteli ispolzuyut nash sayt. Eto sobiraet anonimnye dannye ob ispolzovanii, takie kak prosmotry stranic, tip brauzera i obshchee mestopolozhenie.
privacy.advertisingDescription: My otobrazhaem reklamu cherez Google AdSense i drugikh partnyorov. Eti servisy mogut ispolzovat fayly cookie dlya pokazam relevantnoy reklamy na osnove vashey aktivnosti v internete.
privacy.cookiesDescription: My ispolzuem neobkhodimye fayly cookie dlya raboty sayta i fayly cookie tretikh storon dlya analitiki i reklamy. Upravlyat nastroykamy faylov cookie mozhno v nastroykakh brauzera.
privacy.contactDescription: Po voprosam konfidencialnosti svyazhites s nami:

terms.title: Usloviya ispolzovaniya
terms.metaDescription: Usloviya ispolzovaniya platformy onlayn instrumentov Vaxtim Yoxdu.
terms.acceptDescription: Ispolzuya Vaxtim Yoxdu, vy soglashayetes s etimi Usloviyami ispolzovaniya. Esli vy ne soglasny, pozhaluysta, ne ispolzuyte nashi uslugi.
terms.useDescription: Nashi instrumenty predostavlyayutsya besplatno dlya lichnogo i kommercheskogo ispolzovaniya. Vy ne mozhete ispolzovat nashi uslugi v lyubykh nezakonnykh ili nesankcionirovannykh celyakh.
terms.limitationsDescription: Instrumenty na baze AI imeyut ogranicheniya ispolzovaniya dlya obespecheniya spravedlivogo dostupa dlya vsekh polzovateley. My ostavlyaem za soboy pravo ogranichit dostup polzovateley, zloupotreblyayushchikh nashimi uslugami.
terms.disclaimerDescription: Nashi instrumenty predostavlyayutsya "kak est" bez kakikh-libo garantiy. My ne nesyom otvetstvennosti za lyubuyu poteryu dannykh ili ushcherb, vyzvannye ispolzovaniem nashikh uslug.
terms.changesDescription: My ostavlyaem za soboy pravo izmenyat eti usloviya v lyuboye vremya. Prodolzhenie ispolzovaniya nashikh uslug oznachaet prinyatie obnovlyonnykh usloviy.

footer.description: Kratkie novosti i besplatnye onlayn instrumenty. Registraciya ne nuzhna.

errors.notFoundDescription: Stranica, kotoruyu vy ishchete, ne sushchestvuet ili byla peremeshchena.
errors.notFoundSuggestion: Vozmozhno, vy naydyote to, chto ishchete, zdes:
errors.generalErrorDescription: Proizoshla neprevidennaya oshibka. Pozhaluysta, poprobujte snova.

cookie.message: Этот сайт использует cookie для улучшения вашего опыта.

installPrompt.title: Установите Vaxtim Yoxdu на ваш телефон!
installPrompt.description: Добавьте на главный экран для быстрого доступа.

offline.title: Нет подключения к интернету
offline.description: Для отображения этой страницы требуется подключение к интернету. Пожалуйста, проверьте соединение и попробуйте снова.
offline.hint: Если проблема сохраняется, свяжитесь с вашим интернет-провайдером.

info.metaDescription: Kratkie obzory vazhnykh novostey dnya. Ekonomika, tekhnologii, obrazovanie, sport - vse za odno mgnovenie.
info.title: Novosti
info.subtitle: Korotkie i tochnye novosti - kogda net vremeni, my zdes.
info.noArticles: Novostey na etom yazyke poka net.

blog.metaDescription: Sovety, uroki i rukovodstva ob onlayn instrumentakh, II i proizvoditelnosti.
blog.title: Blog
blog.noArticles: Zapisey v bloge na etom yazyke poka net.

newsletterPopup.title: Budyte v kurse novostey!
newsletterPopup.description: Ezhenedelnye tekh-novosti i novye instrumenty pryamo na vashu pochtu!
newsletterPopup.successDescription: Spasibo! Vy budete pervymi uznavat o poslednikh obnovleniyakh.

newsletterCta.blogDescription: Podpishites, chtoby uznavat o novykh statyakh i poleznykh instrumentakh.
newsletterCta.newsDescription: Poluchayte ezhenedelnyye obzory samykh vazhnykh novostey na vashu pochtu.

newsletterHome.title: Prisoyedinyaytes k nashey ezhenedelnoy rassylke
newsletterHome.description: Samye vazhnye tekh-obnovleniya, novye instrumenty i poleznye sovety pryamo na vashu pochtu.
newsletterHome.bullet2: Uznavayte pervymi o novykh besplatnykh instrumentakh
newsletterHome.bullet3: Sovety i rekomendacii dlya ekonomii vremeni
